data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Post-completion certificate', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for a post-completion certificate, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate its existence or functionality. This lack of direct evidence indicates a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the post-completion certificate feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the post-completion certificate.
